languages.text: "Это еще что, приятель. Только первая партия! В варп, сегодня все мои троны уйдут на настоящий пир для семьи. Поднимем тост за фон Валанциусов. Ты тоже приходи, и детишек приводи".

traits.locale_text: [Драфт] Партия продовольствия принята, можно отгружать следующую.

languages.text: "That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the void with it, today all my thrones are going on a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Bring yourself along, and the little ones too."
languages.original_text: "Это еще что, приятель. Только первая партия! В варп, сегодня все мои троны уйдут на настоящий пир для семьи. Поднимем тост за фон Валанциусов. Ты тоже приходи, и детишек приводи".

traits.locale_text: "That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the warp with it, today all my thrones go for a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Come along, and bring the kids too."
"That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the warp with it, today all my thrones go for a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Come along, and bring the kids too."

"That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the void with it, today all my thrones are going on a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Bring yourself along, and the little ones too."

"That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the void with it, today all my thrones are going on a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Bring yourself along, and the little ones too."

languages.text: «Y eso no es nada, colega, ¡es solo la primera remesa! Al vacío, me voy a dejar todos los tronos en un festín como es debido para la familia. Brindaremos por los von Valancius. Te invito, a ti y a tus peques».
languages.original_text: "That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the void with it, today all my thrones are going on a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Bring yourself along, and the little ones too."

traits.locale_text: «Y eso no es nada, colega, ¡es solo la primera remesa! Al vacío, me voy a dejar todos los tronos en un festín como es debido para la familia. Brindaremos por los von Valancius. Te invito, a ti y a tus peques».

languages.text: “那算什么。这还只是第一批呢！管他呢，今天我要花光所有钱，给家里人准备一顿大餐。我们要为冯·瓦兰修斯干一杯。你也一起来，把孩子们都带上。”
languages.original_text: "That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the void with it, today all my thrones are going on a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Bring yourself along, and the little ones too."

traits.locale_text: “那算什么。这还只是第一批呢！管他呢，今天我要花光所有钱，给家里人准备一顿大餐。我们要为冯·瓦兰修斯干一杯。你也一起来，把孩子们都带上。”

languages.text: "Das ist gar nichts, Kumpel. Nur die erste Fuhre! Zur Leere damit, heute gehen alle meine Throne für ein Festmahl für die Familie drauf. Wir trinken auf Haus von Valancius. Du bist auch eingeladen. Und bring die Kinder mit."
languages.original_text: "That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the void with it, today all my thrones are going on a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Bring yourself along, and the little ones too."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist gar nichts, Kumpel. Nur die erste Fuhre! Zur Leere damit, heute gehen alle meine Throne für ein Festmahl für die Familie drauf. Wir trinken auf Haus von Valancius. Du bist auch eingeladen. Und bring die Kinder mit."

languages.text: « Tu n'as encore rien vu. C'est juste la première cargaison ! Et puis zut, à la fin ! Aujourd'hui, je vais dépenser tous mes trônes pour offrir un festin de roi à ma petite famille. On trinquera à la santé des von Valancius. Tes enfants et toi êtes les bienvenus à notre table. »
languages.original_text: "That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the void with it, today all my thrones are going on a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Bring yourself along, and the little ones too."

traits.locale_text: « Tu n'as encore rien vu. C'est juste la première cargaison ! Et puis zut, à la fin ! Aujourd'hui, je vais dépenser tous mes trônes pour offrir un festin de roi à ma petite famille. On trinquera à la santé des von Valancius. Tes enfants et toi êtes les bienvenus à notre table. »

languages.text: "O da bir şey mi dostum. Daha ilk parti bu! Her neyse, bugün bütün geltlerimi aileme düzgün bir ziyafet vermeye harcayacağım. Von Valanciusların şerefine içeceğiz. Sen de gel, ufaklıkları da getir."
languages.original_text: "That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the void with it, today all my thrones are going on a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Bring yourself along, and the little ones too."

traits.locale_text: "O da bir şey mi dostum. Daha ilk parti bu! Her neyse, bugün bütün geltlerimi aileme düzgün bir ziyafet vermeye harcayacağım. Von Valanciusların şerefine içeceğiz. Sen de gel, ufaklıkları da getir."

languages.text: 「それは何でもないよ、相棒。最初のロットだけだ！今日は、家族の正真正銘の饗宴のために、私のすべての王座を空に送るよ。フォン・ヴァランシウスに乾杯しよう。君も、子供たちもおいで。」
languages.original_text: "That's nothing, mate. Just the first batch! To the void with it, today all my thrones are going on a proper feast for the family. We'll drink to the von Valancius. Bring yourself along, and the little ones too."

traits.locale_text: 「それは何でもないよ、相棒。最初のロットだけだ！今日は、家族の正真正銘の饗宴のために、私のすべての王座を空に送るよ。フォン・ヴァランシウスに乾杯しよう。君も、子供たちもおいで。」
